implemented_core_mechanics: district board flow with 9 named territories and 40 total blocks across the campaign
safehouse flow with field meds ammo cache weapon bench and partner recruit actions
side-scrolling route combat with long scrolling streets and staged spawn events
melee combo flow with light heavy finisher timing hitstop and dash pressure
weapon switching across pistol SMG shotgun and rifle progression
clip ammo reserve ammo and reload timing with combat slab UI
partner roster with assist cooldowns and context-sensitive slot rotation outside battle
enemy pressure mix across brawler rusher pipe gunner brute and lieutenant roles
pickup economy for cash ammo and meds with route reward carryover
district completion unlocking later territories and carrying campaign control state
tracked gameplay art pack assignment with integrated runtime art map
tracked BGM and SFX assignment with project-local audio manifest
animation_and_facing_evidence: GameView loads separate idle walk action hurt and jump poses for the player and flips them from current direction
GameView loads zombie and soldier pose sets for enemy types and alternates walk frames while flipping toward the player
GameView adds dash afterimage, hit sparks, hp bars, pickup bob, projectile travel, and screen shake instead of leaving static placeholders
GameView renders board and safehouse portrait usage for partner support roles and keeps runtime asset paths inside AssetManager-backed project assets
known_limitations: The first playable scope generates district blocks from systemic route templates rather than bespoke hand-authored geometry for every one of the 40 campaign blocks.
The broader concept roster for rooftop sniper biker and shield specialist enemies is compressed into the implemented gunner brute and lieutenant archetypes for the first delivery pass.
remaining_quality_notes: The implemented loop preserves district conquest partner support weapon switching and heavy combat feedback instead of collapsing into a short lock-room arena template.
A later polish pass can deepen unique district prop sets and icon specificity without replacing the current production-ready core.
